title: PantryPal
description: A recipe recommendation system using pretrained CNNs and structured recipe data. Contributed to preprocessing and model evaluation; awarded 1st place for presentation quality.

title: Waste Classifier
description: Built a PyTorch CNN to classify waste images into 7 categories using the TACO dataset, achieving ~70% accuracy through preprocessing, augmentation, and tuning.

title: Machine Learning & Modeling
description: Developed regression, classification, and ensemble models to predict Spotify popularity using cross-validation and metrics like ROC-AUC, RMSE, and R².

title: Film & Data Analysis
description: Analyzed 50+ years of film data to model predictors of Oscar nominations using EDA, feature engineering, and supervised learning with scikit-learn.

title: Shakespearean Language Model
description: Built an NLP application using Mistral-7B and Streamlit to generate Shakespearean text and modern-to-Elizabethan translations in real time.

title: Campus Navigation App
description: Built a web app to help students navigate campus using location data and interactive maps.

title: Movie Recommendation System
description: Developed a collaborative filtering system to recommend movies based on user preferences and ratings.

title: Stock Price Predictor
description: Used time series models to predict stock price trends and visualize market patterns.

title: Fitness Tracker Dashboard
description: Designed a dashboard to analyze workout data and visualize progress over time.

title: Social Media Sentiment Analysis
description: Built a natural language processing model to classify sentiment from social media posts.

title: Weather Data Visualization
description: Created interactive visualizations to explore historical weather trends and seasonal patterns.

title: Online Quiz Platform
description: Developed a web-based quiz system with real-time scoring and user feedback.
